meta.title: InstaMetrics — Instagram Analytics Dashboard
meta.description: Smart analytics for your Instagram. Metrics, reports, and growth insights for creators and community managers.

hero.subtitle: Smart analytics, automated reports, and growth insights for content creators and community managers.
hero.social: Used by 10,000+ creators and community managers

stats.desc1: Posts and stories processed with AI
stats.label1: Posts and stories analyzed with artificial intelligence
stats.label2: Average engagement rate detected on the platform
stats.desc4: Seconds to generate a report — instant
stats.label4: Wait time to generate a complete report
stats.ctaDesc: Metrics updated instantly. No dashboards to refresh manually.

problem.lead: Between creating content, analyzing metrics, and preparing client reports, community managers lose up to 20 hours a week on manual tasks.
problem.card1Title: Manual reports that take hours per client
problem.card1Body: Without automation, every weekly report means opening Instagram, copying metrics by hand, and building a PDF. With 5 clients, that's an entire day lost.
problem.card2Body: Monitoring what your competitors post, which hashtags they use, and how they grow requires manual spreadsheets that are never up to date.
problem.card3Title: Posting blind without knowing your best time
problem.card3Body: Without data on when your audience is most active, you post when you think it works. You lose engagement you could capture with precise timing.
problem.card4Body: Managing multiple Instagram accounts without a unified view forces you to jump between profiles, losing the complete picture of your performance.

solution.lead: InstaMetrics automates all your analysis: metrics, reports, competitors, and timing. You focus on creating content that connects.
solution.step1Desc: Connect your Instagram accounts and start receiving real-time metrics: followers, engagement, reach, impressions.
solution.step2Desc: Identify which content performs best, which hashtags bring more reach, and what your optimal posting time is.
solution.step3Desc: Receive actionable recommendations based on your data: when to post, which format to use, and how to improve engagement.
solution.step4Desc: Generate professional reports in seconds. Share them with clients or your team. Zero spreadsheets, zero wasted hours.

capabilities.heading: Everything you need to grow on Instagram.
capabilities.lead: InstaMetrics centralizes follower analytics, engagement, content, and competitor tracking on a single platform. No complex integrations, no scattered data.
capabilities.card1Desc: Growth, loss, demographics, and audience behavior in real time.
capabilities.card2Desc: Likes, comments, shares, and saves. Daily trends by post and by account.
capabilities.card3Desc: Plan and schedule posts and stories. Weekly view with suggested best posting times.
capabilities.card4Desc: Track your competitors' growth, engagement, and content strategy.
capabilities.card5Desc: Professional PDFs with your metrics. Customizable, with your logo, in seconds.
capabilities.card6Desc: AI that analyzes your audience and tells you the exact moment of highest activity.
capabilities.card7Desc: Complete story metrics: reach, taps, exits, and retention by slide.
capabilities.card8Desc: Manage up to 10 accounts from a single view. Compare performance across profiles.

dashboard.lead: Real-time dashboard with follower analytics, engagement, competitors, and content. Designed for creators and community managers.
dashboard.block1Body: Metrics updated instantly: new followers, engagement rate, reach, and impressions. Everything you need to make decisions today.
dashboard.block2Body: Manage multiple Instagram profiles from a single dashboard. Compare performance, spot trends, and build reports by account or grouped.
dashboard.block3Body: Compare your performance against competitors in your industry. Identify content opportunities and growth gaps.
dashboard.block4Body: Set up weekly or monthly reports that generate on their own. With your branding, your metrics, ready to share with clients.

privacy.lead: 8 layers of protection ensuring your information and your clients' data is secure. We comply with the industry's most demanding standards.
privacy.layer1Desc: Your Instagram accounts connect via official OAuth 2.0. We never store your credentials.
privacy.layer2Desc: Your data is processed under European privacy standards. Right to erasure and portability included.
privacy.layer3Desc: All data in transit and at rest is encrypted with AES-256. Only you see your metrics.
privacy.layer4Desc: We use the official Instagram API exclusively. We comply with all terms of service and policies.
privacy.layer5Desc: Your data is yours. Export it or permanently delete it whenever you want. No fine print.
privacy.layer6Desc: Our cloud infrastructure meets SOC 2 Type II. 24/7 monitoring and automatic backups.
privacy.layer7Desc: Every account you connect requires explicit authorization. Revoke access anytime from Instagram.
privacy.layer8Desc: Every action on your data is logged. You know who accessed it, when, and from where. Full transparency.
privacy.disclaimer: InstaMetrics meets the highest security and privacy standards. Your Instagram data is protected with the same seriousness with which you protect your content.

useCases.card1Use: Grow your community with data. Know what content works and when to post it.
useCases.card2Use: Manage multiple accounts without losing control. Professional reports in seconds.

useCases.card4Use: Monitor your brand presence on Instagram. Benchmark against direct competitors.
useCases.card5Use: Connect your store and measure the ROI of every campaign. Full funnel attribution.
useCases.card6Use: Professional tools within an independent creator's reach. Affordable pricing.
useCases.card7Use: Instagram audits with real data. Identify opportunities for your clients.
useCases.card8Use: Scale your Instagram presence with analytics that grow with your team.

roi.metric1Desc: Recovered per community manager in reporting and analysis tasks that used to be done by hand.
roi.metric2Desc: Increase your engagement rate by posting at the optimal times our AI detects for your audience.
roi.metric3Desc: Time to generate a professional report ready to share with clients or your team.
roi.quoteBody: "I used to spend entire Mondays building reports for my 8 clients. Now I generate them in seconds and focus on creating content that actually adds value."

reviews.lead: Content creators, community managers, and agencies that transformed how they work with Instagram.
reviews.review1Body: "I went from guessing when to post to having precise data. The best-time predictor boosted my engagement by 40% in three weeks. My clients noticed right away."
reviews.review2Body: "What I value most is the multi-account dashboard. We manage 25 Instagram profiles and I can finally see everyone's performance on a single screen. The white-label reports are a game-changer."
reviews.review3Body: "I used to live in Excel spreadsheets. Now InstaMetrics generates my monthly reports automatically. My clients get professional PDFs with their logo and I reclaimed 15 hours a week."
reviews.review4Body: "We connected our store and started seeing which posts drove real sales. Our Instagram ROI became measurable for the first time. Setup in minutes, not weeks."
reviews.review5Body: "Competitor tracking opened our eyes. We discovered our main rival was doubling our story frequency. We adjusted our strategy and matched their engagement in two months."
reviews.review6Body: "We started with the Free plan to test the waters. Switched to Pro within two weeks. The content calendar and time predictor are worth every cent. Our Instagram grew 3x in followers in two months."
reviews.review7Body: "The official Instagram API integration gives me peace of mind. I know we're not violating any terms of service and our data is secure."
reviews.review8Body: "I manage 6 Instagram accounts for different brands. InstaMetrics unified everything in one dashboard. I can finally see every metric without jumping between profiles."
reviews.review9Body: "Hashtag analytics changed the game for us. We discovered we were using tags that were too large. We switched strategy and our organic reach skyrocketed."

pricing.lead: From creators just starting to measure, to agencies managing multiple accounts.
pricing.plan1Desc: To start measuring your Instagram growth.
pricing.plan2Desc: For creators who want to grow with data.
pricing.plan3Desc: For community managers and marketing teams.
pricing.plan4Desc: For agencies and teams managing multiple accounts.

faq.q1: Does the Free plan have limitations?
faq.a1: The Free plan gives you access to 1 Instagram account with basic analytics for the last 7 days, engagement metrics, and scheduling up to 10 posts per week. It's ideal for creators who are starting to measure their growth. If you need more history, more accounts, or advanced features, the Pro, Business, and Agency plans scale with you.
faq.q2: Does InstaMetrics comply with Instagram's terms of service?
faq.a2: Yes. We use the official Instagram API exclusively via OAuth 2.0. We don't scrape, we don't store credentials, and we strictly comply with the platform's policies. Your accounts are safe and you can revoke access at any time from Instagram's settings.
faq.q3: Can I manage multiple Instagram accounts?
faq.a3: Yes. The Free plan includes 1 account, the Pro plan also 1 account, the Business plan supports up to 3 accounts, and the Agency plan supports up to 10 accounts with team access. Everything is managed from a single unified dashboard.
faq.q4: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faq.a4: Your data is yours. Before canceling, you can export all your reports, metrics, and history in CSV or PDF. Upon cancellation, we delete your data from our servers within 30 days. We never share or sell information to third parties.
faq.q5: Is there a trial period for paid plans?
faq.a5: Yes. All paid plans (Pro, Business, and Agency) include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start. You can cancel anytime during the trial and you won't be charged.

ctaFinal.lead: No commitment. No spreadsheets. Just insights that grow your community from day one.

footer.tagline: Instagram analytics dashboard. Smart metrics for creators, community managers, and agencies.
